name: n8n-mcp-community
description: A security-focused MCP server for self-hosted n8n Community Edition.
long_description: Connect a local MCP client to a self-hosted n8n Community Edition instance through 44 bounded tools. The server defaults to read-only, uses the n8n Public API, and performs deterministic Introspect diagnostics without external AI.

n8nApiUrl.title: n8n API URL
n8nApiUrl.description: Absolute HTTP(S) base URL for the intended self-hosted n8n instance; plaintext HTTP is limited to loopback unless explicitly allowed.

n8nApiKey.title: n8n API key
n8nApiKey.description: Dedicated least-privilege n8n Public API key.

mode.title: Operation mode
mode.description: Use read-only by default. Accepted values: read-only, write, unsafe.

allowInsecureHttp.title: Allow insecure HTTP
allowInsecureHttp.description: Keep 0 unless plaintext HTTP to a non-loopback host is explicitly accepted. Accepted values: 0 or 1.
